experience.description: Led system team DevOps and platform engineering efforts. Focused on build infrastructure optimization, CI/CD platform reliability, developer enablement, and automated governance.
bullet_points: Architected and standardized enterprise-scale CI/CD pipelines using Bamboo and GitHub Actions, cutting delivery build cycle time by 30%.
Configured and maintained JFrog Artifactory clusters and SonarQube platforms to ensure secure, compliant artifact caching and code-quality gate checks.
Developed custom PowerShell and Python automation scripts to streamline developer environments, automated repository setups, and secret rotations.
Championed 'Documentation-as-Code' methodologies, aligning developers, QA, and operations around a single markdown-driven truth.

experience.description: Responsible for managing software delivery tools, infrastructure-as-code deployments, and automated testing integrations.
bullet_points: Built containerized build agents with Docker, reducing environment provisioning time from hours to minutes.
Migrated legacy build systems from manual servers to infrastructure-as-code templates, managing over 50 projects.
Implemented REST API integrations between Jira, Bitbucket, and CI servers to create end-to-end audit trails for compliance.
Automated package management repositories and dependency scanning processes.

experience.description: Worked on build scripting, test automation, and infrastructure health monitoring.
bullet_points: Managed Windows and Linux server environments, automating patch management and build tasks via PowerShell and Bash.
Integrated automated static analysis tools into developer branch checks, decreasing build-failure rates in staging by 25%.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) in Computer Science & Engineering
